title: APC UPS SNMP Remaining Runtime Below Threshold
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-1h
| eval runtime_min=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvBatteryRunTimeRemaining, upsEstimatedMinutesRemaining, battery_runtime_min, ""))
| eval load_pct=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvOutputLoad, upsOutputPercentLoad, ""))
| where isnotnull(runtime_min) AND runtime_min < 8
| table _time ups_name host runtime_min load_pct
description: Low remaining runtime during utility loss leaves no margin for generator start or orderly shutdown.
value: Prevents data loss and hardware damage during brownouts.
implementation: (1) Poll UPS-MIB runtime remaining. (2) Set threshold to site generator profile. (3) Page datacenter lead.
visualization: Single value min runtime; trend line.
grandmaExplanation: We warn when backup power minutes run low so shutdowns stay controlled.
